elements.text:
Excalidraw
needs to be a default
mdx component
elements.originalText:
Excalidraw
needs to be a default
mdx component

elements.text:
Excalidraw mdx needs to expose 
- get nodes and connections as endpoints for LLMs
to consume the flow charts with
- ideally we need a token light intermediate loader
to convert excalidraw's giant json only into the important
things that are needed for the LLM: node text+color 
and connections
- they can directly edit JSON to update state 
(like making a card green for done)
- refresh drawing on page endpoint
elements.originalText:

things that are needed for the LLM: node text+color 
and connections
- they can directly edit JSON to update state 
(like making a card green for done)
- refresh drawing on page endpoint

elements.text:
- let MDX be available
for all md files anyway.
There's no reason to
impose mdx extension

- let .md files with mdx
show themselves using
mdx icon though

- rename current demo.mdx
to mdx-demo.md so it shows
up as folder doc
